rule: Founder ops truth on disk beats chat, branch assumptions, and stale www copy. Agents MUST read this file before building.

google_workspace_inbox.meaning: Direct email + Reply-from-Gmail/Outlook works. This is NOT the same as form auto-notify.

form_delivery_resend.meaning: RESEND_API_KEY on Vercel www — auto-notify inbox on every form submit + auto-ack. Intentionally after factory build wave.
form_delivery_resend.fallback: mailto: on intake forms + direct email to operations@

stripe_commercial_licensing.note: Commercial licensing only — not payment execution/custody

platform_factories.priority: Build factories before wiring form delivery (founder order 2026-06-03)

founder_orders_active.order: Audit everything and update before building new features
Email form sending deferred until after factory build — inbox is live via Google Workspace

stale_sources_do_not_trust: Chat-only founder updates (not yet written to this file)
Branch-local work (stripe-gtm-setup, sandbox-v2) not merged to deploy branch
ops/private/sourceA/ when mirror missing on cloud VM

trustfield_boundary.note: TrustField / trustfield.ca is a separate company (R-001). This file does NOT sync to TrustField agents automatically.
trustfield_boundary.bridge: Founder must sync SourceA SEMI_NOTICE or paste into TrustField repo separately
